home.hero_title: Product Designer specialized in Design Systems.

index.t006: Product Designer specialized in Design Systems.

about.t005: I currently work at UST for The Adecco Group, a Zurich-based international company with offices across all five continents and more than 10 brands.
about.t006: The DS design process was based on Agile methodologies and data-driven decisions, considering user, business, and development cost implications.

connect.t013: Adecco Connect is a platform that centralizes recruitment processes and job posting for Adecco recruiters.
connect.t022: Figma was used for collaboration and prototyping, Zeroheight for component documentation, and Storybook for documenting and sharing system components with developers.
connect.t026: Participant segmentation included 16 usability testing sessions with Connect users, exploring the workflow to create a recruitment process. The features investigated included:
connect.t027: Setting up a new recruitment process
connect.t029: Adding a hard-skill test to the process
connect.t031: The error rate for mistaken clicks in the drag-and-drop video feature was 50%, suggesting it wasn’t perceived as clearly visible.
connect.t032: Even though participants rated the task as easy, it took them 3 clicks to achieve the objective.

guuk.t012: Redesigning Guuk’s commercial site: improving navigation and customer service in the telecommunications sector
guuk.t016: The goal was to create a new section within the website with a well-structured information architecture, enabling customers to find answers as quickly as possible.

smowltech.t012: Improving live monitoring, accessibility, and incident review workflows for a proctoring SaaS

tagds.t012: The Adecco Group’s multi-brand design system spans all digital platforms within the group.
tagds.t021: Figma was used for design and prototyping, Zeroheight for component documentation, and Storybook for documenting and sharing components with developers.
tagds.t031: The future of the design system
tagds.t032: Based on continuous feedback, the design system is constantly evolving, with plans to expand the component library and improve guidelines to adapt to new technologies and user needs.
tagds.t034: LinkedIn post announcing the launch of TAG DS
